countries.name: Australia
facts: Australia is both a country and the largest landmass in Oceania.
funFacts: Australia is both a country and the largest landmass in Oceania.

specialRegions.name: Greenland
facts: Greenland is the world’s largest island.
Greenland is geographically part of North America.

specialRegions.name: New Zealand
facts: New Zealand consists mainly of the North Island and South Island.
Aotearoa is the Māori name commonly used for New Zealand.

specialRegions.name: Antarctica
facts: Antarctica contains the geographic South Pole.
